caveats: Lower peak throughput than the fan-backed Burst lane.

profile.name: stable
profile.summary: Stable Mode: exact/staged long-reply path with no fan control. Hidden from first-run onboarding, but available by flag for compatibility.

Endpoint e_12: GET /api/v1/users/{id}/connections — validates UUID format, checks authorization header, calls user_service.fetch_connections(id), returns 200 with JSON body or 404. Rate limit: 100 req/min. Cache-Control: private, max-age=60.
